title: Sample Book
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A sample novel demonstrating the standard AI-Books structure.
long_description: In the quiet coastal town of Port Mercy, librarian Elena Marchetti discovers a hidden archive beneath the old library floor. As she sifts through letters, diaries, and photographs spanning over a century, the intertwined stories of the town's residents come alive. With the help of retired fisherman Thomas Webb, visiting historian Dr. Amina Shah, and carpenter Leo Costa, Elena pieces together a tapestry of love, loss, and resilience that reshapes her understanding of home. A meditation on memory and community, this novel shows how every life leaves its mark.
